---
title: "OLTP vs OLAP"
engine: knitr
filters:
  - interactive-duckdb
databases:
  - name: cookbook
    path: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Alaburda/data-analyst-sql-cookbook/master/databases/cookbook.duckdb"
    format: duckdb
---

# OLAP vs OLTP

Why do you need both, what's the difference, differences between rowstore, columnstore and row groups.

```{r setup}

#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(duckdb)

con <- dbConnect(duckdb(), "../databases/cookbook.duckdb", read_only = TRUE)

```
